_comment: Low-risk MCP profile (plan P7). Docs/search read-only set for sessions that review untrusted external content (web pages, GitHub PR/issue bodies, third-party docs). Excludes the four servers that, per Meta's 2025-10 Agents Rule of Two, would combine with the (B) untrusted-content servers in this set to form an exploitable combination: memory (private-data sink that injections can write to and exfiltrate via a later (C)-capable session), github (private repos + write authority), runpod (state-change: pod create runs arbitrary image), cloudflare (state-change: DNS write is textbook exfil; Worker deploy is RCE). Activate with: scripts/sync-mcp.sh --profile low-risk. See docs/security-hardening-implementation-plan.md §P7.
